fs-idm207953136.latex: \begin{aligned} \text{anode:} \, \text{Pb} ( s ) + {\text{HSO}}_{4} ^{\text{−}} ( a q ) \, \longrightarrow \, {\text{PbSO}}_{4} ( s ) + {\text{H}}^{\text{+}} ( a q ) + {\text{2e}}^{\text{−}} \\ {\text{cathode: PbO}}_{2} ( s ) + {\text{HSO}}_{4} ^{\text{−}} ( a q ) + {\text{3H}}^{\text{+}} ( a q ) + {\text{2e}}^{\text{−}} \, \longrightarrow \, {\text{PbSO}}_{4} ( s ) + 2 {\text{H}}_{2} \text{O} ( l ) \, \end{aligned} ¯ \text{cell:} \, \text{Pb} ( s ) + {\text{PbO}}_{2} ( s ) + 2 {\text{H}}_{2} {\text{SO}}_{4} ( a q ) \, \longrightarrow \, {\text{2PbSO}}_{4} ( s ) + 2 {\text{H}}_{2} \text{O} ( l ) \, {E}_{\text{cell}} ~ 2 \, \text{V}
